text.title: Product Analytics Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Product Analytics. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Pick exactly one north-star metric (NSM) tied to delivered value.
rule.rationale: Pick exactly one north-star metric (NSM) tied to delivered value.

rule.statement: Beyond NSM, 3-5 leading + 1 health metric — total ≤7.
rule.rationale: Beyond NSM, 3-5 leading + 1 health metric — total ≤7.

rule.statement: Tracking plan (event + properties + owner) written before instrumentation.
rule.rationale: Tracking plan (event + properties + owner) written before instrumentation.

rule.statement: Dashboard mockup precedes SQL — what answers what question.
rule.rationale: Dashboard mockup precedes SQL — what answers what question.

rule.statement: Weekly review consumes the dashboard; metric without review is vanity.
rule.rationale: Weekly review consumes the dashboard; metric without review is vanity.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-product-analytics.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
